revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:粘土槨]]


{{Unreferenced|date=November 11, 2022, 14:53 (UTC)|qq=}}
'''Clay coffin chambers''' (粘土槨, Nendokaku) are burial facilities from {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} where a {{ill|wooden coffin|ja|木棺|1=Wooden Coffin|1=Wooden Coffin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/wooden coffin|13=User:Immanuelle/Wooden Coffin|qq=}} is placed on a clay bed within a {{ill|Prehistoric storage pits|en|Prehistoric storage pits|qid=Q1421012|lt=pit|1=Prehistoric storage pits}} dug into the mound. The wooden coffin is then covered with clay and the pit is refilled. This form of burial is thought to be a simplified version of the {{ill|vertical stone chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/vertical stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}}, where coffins are encased in large quantities of stone.
== Related articles ==
* {{ill|Pit-type graves|ja|土坑墓|1=Pit graves|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Pit-type graves|13=User:Immanuelle/Pit graves|qq=}}
* {{ill|Split bamboo-shaped wooden coffin|ja|割竹形木棺|1=Waritakegata Mokkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Split bamboo-shaped wooden coffin|13=User:Immanuelle/Waritakegata Mokkan|qq=}}
* {{ill|Boat-shaped wooden coffin|ja|舟形木棺|1=Funagata Mokkan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boat-shaped wooden coffin|13=User:Immanuelle/Funagata Mokkan|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yayoi period burial practices|ja|弥生時代の墓制|1=Funerary practices of the Yayoi period|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yayoi period burial practices|13=User:Immanuelle/Funerary practices of the Yayoi period|qq=}}
* {{ill|Vertical stone chamber|ja|竪穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=竪穴式石室|4=zh|5=豎穴式石室|1=Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Vertical Pit-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}}
* {{ill|Horizontal stone chamber|ja|横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|2=ja|3=横穴式石室|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|4=zh|5=橫穴式石室|6=ko|7=굴식 돌방무덤|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|1=Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Horizontal stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Corridor-Style Stone Chamber|qq=}}
